title: Emulation Prerequisites
description: Machine-readable prerequisites for an adversary emulation package. Read by the MayaTrail platform before execution to validate that all required credentials and config are present.

campaign.description: Threat actor / campaign name, e.g. LUCR-3

csp.description: Primary cloud provider or multi for multi-cloud

providers.description: One entry per Pulumi provider used. Key is the provider short-name (aws, okta, azuread, github, gcp, azure).

required.description: If true, pulumi up will fail without these credentials

credentials.description: Ordered list of env vars the provider reads at startup

min_permissions.description: IAM/RBAC actions the credentials must be allowed to perform

pulumi_config.description: Values set via `pulumi config set` before `pulumi up`. NOT env vars — stored in Pulumi.dev.yaml.

required.description: If true, pulumi up will fail or behave incorrectly without it

description.description: What this value is and where to get it

default.description: Value used if not explicitly set

how_to_get.description: Step-by-step instructions for obtaining the value

attack_env_vars.description: Env vars needed when attack.py runs (after pulumi up). These are NOT Pulumi provider credentials and NOT Pulumi config — they are passed to the attack script directly.

required.description: If true, attack.py will abort without it

how_to_get.description: Where / how to obtain this value

python_packages.description: Contents of requirements.txt as an array. Included here so the platform can check package availability before attempting pulumi up.
